falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as that bottom held at ~4,800; this would signal the structure is not replicating and the HOLD signal is wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28; a sustained spike to 35+ would indicate panic dynamics inconsistent with the bottoming pattern, proving the BLOWOFF SCORE of 41 understated true stress and the pattern match is false

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts more than -50 basis points (i.e., -0.50% or steeper inversion) on daily close
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with curve disinversion underway; a deepening inversion would signal recessionary repricing not present in the matched pattern, invalidating the macro regime assumption underlying the HOLD verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
